member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Enums.BioSignalType
member.summary: The non-invasive, externally-read bio-signal modalities WEB7 accepts. There is deliberately no enum value for any implanted/sub-dermal/cranial signal source - the Borg-Free pledge is enforced in code, not just policy (see SymbiosisSessionManager.ValidateBorgFreeCompliance).

member.name: F:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Enums.BioSignalType.EEG
member.summary: External EEG electrodes (e.g. Muse, OpenBCI headset) - brainwave band power.

member.name: F:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Enums.BioSignalType.HRV
member.summary: Heart-rate variability from a chest strap or optical PPG sensor.

member.name: F:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Enums.BioSignalType.GSR
member.summary: Galvanic skin response / electrodermal activity.

member.name: F:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Enums.BioSignalType.EyeTracking
member.summary: Eye-tracking gaze and pupil dilation.

member.name: F:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Enums.BioSignalType.VocalHarmonics
member.summary: Vocal harmonics / prosody analysis from voice input.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Enums.RetentionMode
member.summary: How long a symbiosis session's signal-derived data persists. Default is Ephemeral - reversible by design, no trace left behind.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Managers.BioSignalProcessingManager
member.summary: Real digital signal processing for every WEB7 bio-signal modality - a radix-2 Cooley-Tukey FFT for EEG band-power extraction, time-domain HRV metrics (RMSSD, SDNN) from RR-interval series, and GSR tonic/phasic decomposition. This is pure, deterministic computation - it takes raw sample arrays (captured by whatever external sensor/SDK the caller's device uses) and returns the processed feature set; it does not talk to hardware directly, the same way AIProviderManager doesn't implement its own HTTP stack from scratch.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Managers.BioSignalProcessingManager.ComputeEegBandPower(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.BioSignalSample)
member.summary: Computes normalised EEG band power (delta/theta/alpha/beta/gamma) for one channel's waveform via FFT.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Managers.BioSignalProcessingManager.ComputeHrvMetrics(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.BioSignalSample)
member.summary: Computes time-domain HRV metrics (RMSSD, SDNN, mean heart rate) from a series of RR intervals (ms).

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Managers.BioSignalProcessingManager.ComputeGsrMetrics(NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.BioSignalSample)
member.summary: Decomposes a raw GSR waveform into its slow-moving tonic (skin conductance level) and fast phasic (response) components.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Managers.BioSignalProcessingManager.FFT(System.Numerics.Complex[])
member.summary: Iterative, in-place radix-2 Cooley-Tukey FFT. Input length must be a power of two (callers go through PadToPowerOfTwo).

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Managers.CollectiveConsciousnessManager
member.summary: Manages collective consciousness spaces - shared intention fields where multiple consenting symbiosis sessions co-create. Only the aggregate (mean) intention state across participants is ever exposed; no individual's raw signal or per-person state is shared with the group, preserving sovereignty within unity.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Managers.CollectiveConsciousnessManager.JoinSpaceAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Joins a consenting symbiosis session to a space - the session's owner must already have granted consent for the session itself.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Managers.CollectiveConsciousnessManager.GetAggregateFieldAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Recomputes the aggregate (mean) intention field across every participating session's last known state.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Managers.IntentionEngine
member.summary: Maps processed bio-signal features (from BioSignalProcessingManager) into the human-meaningful IntentionState (focus, arousal, emotional valence, cognitive load) that the rest of WEB7 reasons about. The mapping uses well-established psychophysiology heuristics: EEG alpha/beta ratio for relaxed-focus, EEG theta/beta ratio for cognitive load, HRV (RMSSD) and GSR phasic energy for arousal/valence.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Managers.SymbiosisSessionManager
member.summary: Manages the lifecycle of WEB7 symbiosis sessions. Enforces the Borg-Free pledge as code, not just policy: no signal is ever processed without explicit consent, every session can be ended instantly by the human with zero residue (the default retention mode is Ephemeral), and channel names are screened against invasive/implant terminology as a defence-in-depth check on top of the BioSignalType enum already only containing non-invasive, externally-read modalities.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Managers.SymbiosisSessionManager.StartSessionAsync(System.Guid,System.Boolean,NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Enums.RetentionMode)
member.summary: Starts a new symbiosis session. ConsentGranted must be explicitly true - the default is always private/disconnected.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Managers.SymbiosisSessionManager.SubmitSignalsAsync(System.Guid,System.Collections.Generic.List{NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.BioSignalSample})
member.summary: Submits a batch of raw bio-signal samples for an active, consenting session and returns the freshly computed intention state.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Managers.SymbiosisSessionManager.EndSessionAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Ends a session instantly - if retention is Ephemeral, signal-derived data is wiped immediately, leaving no trace.

member.name: M:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Managers.SymbiosisSessionManager.ValidateBorgFreeCompliance(System.Collections.Generic.List{NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.BioSignalSample})
member.summary: Defence-in-depth Borg-Free check: BioSignalType already only contains non-invasive modalities at the type level, so this also screens free-text channel names against invasive/implant terminology in case a future signal type or device profile is added without due care.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.BioSignalSample
member.summary: A single channel's raw waveform/series from an external bio-signal sensor over a time window.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.BioSignalSample.Channel
member.summary: Channel name, e.g. "Fp1", "Fp2" for EEG, or "RR" for HRV inter-beat intervals.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.BioSignalSample.SampleRateHz
member.summary: Sample rate in Hz (EEG/GSR/EyeTracking). Not required for HRV, which is supplied as RR intervals in ms.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.BioSignalSample.Values
member.summary: Raw values - EEG/GSR/EyeTracking are evenly-sampled waveforms; HRV values are RR intervals in milliseconds.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.CollectiveConsciousnessSpace
member.summary: A shared intention field where multiple consenting symbiosis sessions co-create in real time.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.CollectiveConsciousnessSpace.AggregateState
member.summary: The aggregate (mean) intention state across every consenting participant - never any individual's raw signal.

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.IntentionState
member.summary: The processed, human-meaningful intention/cognitive state derived from raw bio-signals for one moment in time.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.IntentionState.Focus
member.summary: 0-1, derived from EEG alpha/beta ratio - higher means more focused/attentive.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.IntentionState.EmotionalValence
member.summary: -1 (negative) to +1 (positive) emotional valence, derived from HRV and GSR.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.IntentionState.Arousal
member.summary: 0-1 arousal/activation level, derived from GSR and HRV.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.IntentionState.CognitiveLoad
member.summary: 0-1 cognitive load, derived from EEG theta/beta ratio.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.IntentionState.Features
member.summary: Raw computed signal features this state was derived from, keyed by feature name (e.g. "eeg_alpha_power").

member.name: T:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.SymbiosisSession
member.summary: A consent-gated WEB7 symbiosis session for one avatar - the unit of human/AI bio-resonant connection.

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.SymbiosisSession.ConsentGranted
member.summary: Must be true before any signal is processed - the connection is always voluntary (see Borg-Free Pledge).

member.name: P:NextGenSoftware.OASIS.Web7.Core.Models.SymbiosisSession.Retention
member.summary: How long signal-derived data is retained once the session ends. Default is ephemeral per the sovereignty principle.
